    <item>
        <guid>nba530363</guid>
        <title>Victor Wembanyama: Makes history in Game 1 loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/victor-wembanyama-5809</link>
        <description>Wembanyama supplied 11 points (5-17 FG, 0-8 3Pt, 1-2 FT), 15 rebounds, 12 blocks and five assists across 40 minutes in Monday's 104-102 loss to Minnesota in Game 1 of the Western Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 04 May 2026 9:40:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530362</guid>
        <title>Julius Randle: Paces Minnesota in Game 1 win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/julius-randle-3574</link>
        <description>Randle recorded 21 points (8-20 FG, 2-6 3Pt, 3-6 FT), 10 rebounds, two assists and one steal across 41 minutes in Monday's 104-102 win over the Spurs in Game 1 of the Western Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 04 May 2026 9:31:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530361</guid>
        <title>Joel Embiid: Shooting woes in Game 1 defeat</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/joel-embiid-3572</link>
        <description>Embiid finished Monday's 137-98 loss to New York in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Semifinals with 14 points (3-11 FG, 0-2 3Pt, 8-9 FT), four rebounds and one assist across 25 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 04 May 2026 9:22:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530360</guid>
        <title>Tyrese Maxey: Struggles in Game 1 loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/tyrese-maxey-5158</link>
        <description>Maxey registered 13 points (3-9 FG, 0-3 3Pt, 7-7 FT), three rebounds and two assists across 27 minutes during Monday's 137-98 loss to the Knicks in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 04 May 2026 9:14:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba530358</guid>
        <title>Karl-Anthony Towns: Stuffs stat sheet in limited run</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/karl-anthony-towns-3741</link>
        <description>Towns tallied 17 points (7-11 FG, 3-5 3Pt), six rebounds, six assists and two blocks across 20 minutes in Monday's 137-98 win over the 76ers in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference Semifinals.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Mon, 04 May 2026 8:26:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
